title: 10 best herbal teas for ingrown hair
description: Hypericum perforatum teas helps with ingrown hair because of its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which reduce redness and swelling associated with ingrown hairs. The tea's flavonoids and phenolic acids may also help to soothe and calm the skin, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.
